payload.title: GitHub OAuth app + OIDC config wired into the cloud hub
payload.description: Register a GitHub OAuth app (client id/secret, callback https://scope-hub.fly.dev/auth/callback). Wire SCOPE_OIDC_* config into src/auth_hosted/oidc.js for the cloud hub; set secrets via fly secrets. Verify discover()/buildAuthUrl()/handleCallback() against the real provider.
